title: Do you call that a hat?
question: 把今天课文里的“审美不同 -> 避免直接讽刺 -> 用 needn't 软化 -> 用 mustn't 说规则 -> 用 needn't have said 道歉”放进购物场景。用 word bank 补完整 4 个空。
example_answer: It is not really my style, but you can try it on. You needn't worry about my opinion. We mustn't spend more than our budget. Sorry, I needn't have said it so directly.

options.label: A
options.scenario_zh: 礼貌表达不喜欢：说这不是我的风格，但可以试试

options.label: B
options.scenario_zh: 用 needn't 安慰对方：不用太担心我的意见

options.label: C
options.scenario_zh: 用 mustn't 说清楚规则：不能超过预算

options.label: D
options.scenario_zh: 刚才太直接后道歉：本来没必要说得那么直
